nasb.text: If a man does not repent, He will sharpen His sword; He has bent His bow and made it ready.

esv.text: If a man does not repent, God will whet his sword; he has bent and readied his bow;

cnv.text: 如果人不悔改， 　神必把他的刀磨快。 　神已經把弓拉開，準備妥當。

ccb.text: 他们若不悔改，祂必磨刀霍霍， 弯弓搭箭，诛灭他们。

csbs.text: 如果人不回转， 神就把自己的刀剑磨利， 并拉开弓瞄准；
